flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Dillard University are 25% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($39.2k vs $51.9k).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dillard University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (40.2% → 28.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
